[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017-01-19
[TITLE]: Thanks, Obama: how the president's supporters spent his last day in office | Barack Obama | The Guardian
[METADATA/INTRO]: On Barack Obama’s final day in office, Cassandra Metzger stood on a sidewalk facing the White House uncertain of her future. She had arrived with a group of friends in the early morning to show gratitude toward the outgoing president,...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: “You know what, it’s history,” she said. “I’m not happy about it, I’m not celebrating … but I’m still going to go.” 
 Percival noted, however, that she planned to wear a “pussy hat” – a knit hat with little ears donned by women in reference to leaked audio of Trump boasting about sexually assaulting women – “in silent protest”. 
 Organizers sought to keep the spotlight on Obama, rather than dwelling on the next commander-in-chief. Walls were covered in white poster board, where attendees left messages thanking Obama for his service. 
 A representative from a local performing arts collective, One Love Massive, told the crowd the purpose of the gathering was to reflect on the historic nature of Obama’s presidency.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: The Trump resistance movement builds - BBC News
[METADATA/INTRO]: President Barack Obama, as the campaigner-in-chief for Hillary Clinton, would often remind upset rally-goers "don't boo. Vote." But now that the election is over, and the vote is in, Americans wishing to protest their victorious political rivals are looking for...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The movement was started by a digital brand strategist in San Francisco, external who was upset that Ms Trump did not condemn a leaked recording of her father boasting that his celebrity status allowed him to "grab" women's genitals. 
 Separately, residents in several New York City west side apartment buildings bearing Mr Trump's name have voted to remove the moniker from the premises. 
 The property firm that owns the buildings said it was adopting "a neutral building identity that appeals to all current and future residents"., external 
 At least three NBA basketball teams are reportedly considering, external staying in hotels that do not bear the Trump name.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Blaming 'wine moms' for ICE protests is an old tactic with a new target | CBC News
[METADATA/INTRO]: Blaming 'wine moms' for ICE protests is an old tactic with a new target There's been a distinct shift in language used by the Trump administration and its defenders...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: This has especially been common with protests involving minority populations, Chen says, but what's different now is their target. 
 So-called wine moms have typically been a valued voting demographic in the eyes of politicians, says MacDonald, the University of Waterloo communications expert. If we're going by stereotypes, they're middle-class, suburban, have money for leisure, and white, she added. 
 "To turn that, and then make it an enemy is startling," MacDonald said. 
 With files from the Associated Press
